testcase.name: test_authenticated

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?"

testcase.error: tests/test_iter4.py:32: in admin return _login("susanto", "admin123") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_iter4.py:25: in _login r = s.post(f"{API}/auth/login", json={"username": u, "password": p}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?

testcase.error: tests/test_iter4.py:42: in store return _login("store01", "store123") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_iter4.py:25: in _login r = s.post(f"{API}/auth/login", json={"username": u, "password": p}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?

testcase.name: test_unauth

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/stats/monthly': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/stats/monthly?

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter4.py:78: in test_unauth r = requests.get(f"{API}/stats/monthly") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:87: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:71: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/stats/monthly': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/stats/monthly?

testcase.name: test_so_no_stored_and_retrieved

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?"

testcase.error: tests/test_iter4.py:32: in admin return _login("susanto", "admin123") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_iter4.py:25: in _login r = s.post(f"{API}/auth/login", json={"username": u, "password": p}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?
